use_cases: Displaying feature sections with title and description
Building pricing or comparison card layouts
Structuring dashboard or data display widgets
Composing article or blog post previews
ai_summary: A set of reusable card UI components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) built on shadcn/ui patterns. These atomic components use Tailwind CSS for styling with minimal visual treatment including basic shadows and rounded corners. Designed as foundational building blocks for creating feature sections, content cards, and data display layouts across various interface contexts.
